hyperedges.label: ELF Exec and Ring-3 Entry Pipeline
syscall_dispatch integrates task, cap, ipc, vmm, pmm subsystems
4-level page walk chain: walk_or_create/walk_existing operate on PML4/PDPT/PD/PT
OROS Critical Daemon Triad (lythd + lythdist + lythmsg) triggers rollback
Boot Capability Delegation Flow (kmain → exec → lythd with mem/rollback/boot caps)
IPC Blocking/Waking Task Flow (ipc send/recv ↔ task block_and_yield/wake_task)
ELF Load and Execute Flow (exec parses ELF, maps pages via VMM/PMM, allocates stack, spawns trampoline)

nodes.label: ELF Loader Limitations (no ASLR, no PIE, shared PML4)
nodes.norm_label: elf loader limitations (no aslr, no pie, shared pml4)

nodes.label: Initial Boot Capabilities (mem, rollback, boot IPC)
nodes.norm_label: initial boot capabilities (mem, rollback, boot ipc)

nodes.label: IPC Limitations (64-byte fixed, no multicast, no timeout)
nodes.norm_label: ipc limitations (64-byte fixed, no multicast, no timeout)
